description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, rectangular footprint. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, especially facing the pool and patio area, allowing for ample natural light. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch with potted plants and a set of steps leading up to the main door. The backyard includes a spacious swimming pool, a sunbathing deck, and outdoor seating areas shaded by small trees and pergolas. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or sand color, giving the building a clean, contemporary look. Minimalist landscaping with a few strategically placed trees and shrubs enhances the open, airy feel of the property.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a pool, and minimalist landscaping. The light-colored exterior and open layout emphasize contemporary design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a covered porch, potted plants, and steps, as well as a glimpse of the pool and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the expansive pool, sunbathing deck, and outdoor lounge area, with large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the full length of the bungalow, the pool area to the left, and minimal landscaping along the back wall.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side and rear of the bungalow, including the flat roof, back entrance, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors facing the pool
